name: 18 Holes Simulator Golf and Games
about: 18 Holes Simulator Golf & Games is Kerrville's exclusive premier indoor golfing destination featuring climate-controlled facilities. The venue utilizes Trackman simulators that analyze swing and ball flight to provide on-screen analytics, catering to golfers of all skill levels from beginners to experienced players looking to improve their game. Beyond traditional golf, the simulators offer arcade games and a variety of membership plans, making it a versatile entertainment spot for individuals and families.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman technology for swing and ball flight analysis
Variety of courses including Pebble Beach Golf Links
Flexible membership options for different playing needs
Arcade games available for non-golf entertainment

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulators with swing and ball flight analysis capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental options, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs when visiting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No specific policy is mentioned regarding outside food or drinks, so it's best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The average time to play an 18-hole round is about two hours according to the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly with dedicated pricing for players 15 and younger ($15 per hour) and arcade games available for family enjoyment.
